summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Pipeline page FINAL version. ALL 18 features verified successfully. This version PRESERVES all existing logic (carousel, filter pills, swipe, Priority/Pipeline toggle, KanbanBoard) while applying specific design changes (removed 'View details' button, removed 'Also' peek row, added 'WHERE YOU ARE IN THE PROCESS' label).
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (5 schools for Emma Chen: Emory, Stanford, Florida, UCLA, Creighton)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline page FINAL version fully verified. All existing logic preserved (carousel, toggle, kanban, swipe). Specific removals confirmed (no 'View details', no 'Also' peek row). New label added ('WHERE YOU ARE IN THE PROCESS').

verified_features.17_pipeline_list: PASS - 'ALL PROGRAMS' section with 5 school rows (name, stage, progress bar, next step, View)
verified_features.18_kanban_board: PASS - Pipeline view shows Kanban with 5 columns (Added, Outreach, Talking, Visit, Offered)
verified_features.19_view_toggle_works: PASS - Switching between Priority and Pipeline views works correctly

testing_notes.login_method: Fill email and password, press Enter on password field
testing_notes.navigation: After login redirects to /board, click 'My Schools' to navigate to /pipeline
testing_notes.data_state: 5 programs: Emory (high/overdue 4d), Stanford (high/tomorrow), Florida (high/tomorrow), UCLA (medium/tomorrow), Creighton (low/on-track)
testing_notes.wait_time: 10-12 seconds for momentum-recap LLM data to load
